DEBRA DOLCH TO BECOME ADMIN OF THE ESTATE WITH LIMITED AUTHORITY. PARTIES AGREE TO RECOGNIZE MARY WOODS AS COUSIN AND GIVE HER 1/16 SHARE OF THE ESTATE. BOND FOR $1,390,000.00
JUDGE JOHN DEARMAN, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, RPTR:CHRISTINA PAXTON

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property And To Enter Into An Exclusive Right To Sell Real Property Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-28-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Nancy Rasch appearing for special administrator. David Owens appearing for Joseph Caroli. Anne Steele appearing for Mary Woods, Margot Dolgin & Dany Walker. Ms. Rasch informed the court that Mr. Malone was in court and he has to leave because of conflict. He asked Ms. Rasch to inform the court that he has not filed a Statement of Interest because he is working on identify heirs in Europe. Ms. Steele and Mr. Owens have filed Statement of Interest for their clients. Ms. Steel is not objecting to the sale of property but she objects to the broker representing both seller and buyer. Ms. Rasch responds to her concerns. Matter granted. Counsel to prepare order. Mr. Owens and Ms. Steel to give notice for their Statement of Interest for hearing on 6/14. Matter is continued to 6/14 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
